title: Body Shower Brush Back Scrubber: Anti Slip 18.1'' Long Handle Bath Brush with Stiff and Soft Bristles - Showering Exfoliator for Women, Men, Elderly (Charcoal Grey)
features: 18.1" Extra-long Handle Sufficient to Reach Lower Back: This Body Brush handle is longer than a normal brush, covers 10% more back area than similar products. Effortlessly covers your entire back, calves, feet and other hard-to-reach areas —no bending or straining required. Perfect for tall users or limited mobility!

Stiff & Soft Double-sided Brush: One side is natural stiff bristles, which can deeply clean and massage the skin, or dry brush the body, for effective exfoliation exfoliate dead skin and promote circulation. Soft nylon bristles on the other side, which are 20% denser than standard bristles and can produce richer foam. Suitable for sensitive skin, it can gently and effectively clean and protect the skin

Dry Brushing Function: The long handle bath brush has a dry brushing function, which can effectively clean pores, exfoliate, remove dirt, dead skin, excess oil and pore residue. It can promote blood circulation and make the skin healthier

Ultra-Light & Non-mold: This back scrubber for shower more than 30% lighter than other wooden back brushes, making it easier to hold and bathe. The handle made of polypropylene is low in density, high in strength, waterproof, durable. It dries quickly and is easy to clean, doesn't attract mold

Upgraded Non-Slip Grip: Two sections of non-slip textured rubber are added to the shower brush handle. Easily and reliably grab or hold anywhere along the length of the handle while in the shower, even in wet, soapy, body wash conditions

Easy to Use and Hang: This bath brush is a good helper for women, men, and the elderly in the shower or bath! After you get it, please assemble the brush head and the handle first, and then start dry or wet brushing. Comes with a hanging rope for easy storage and drying

Multi-Color Options: Perfect for Gifting & Family Use. Available in multiple vibrant colors, our bath brush lets each family member have their own dedicated brush—ideal for keeping routines organized and avoiding mix-ups. Thoughtful & Practical Gift Choice: Great for housewarmings, holidays, or self-care gifts – Adds a pop of color to any bathroom. Promotes hygiene & personalization – Perfect for kids, adults, and seniors!

Pro Tip: The stiff bristles of this bath brush are made of wild boar bristles and are not chemically bleached. Some bristles may retain a faint, natural odor, which is completely normal. This odor is harmless to your health and will dissipate with use. For best results, we recommend leaving the brush in a well-ventilated area for several hours before first use. After each use, please clean it thoroughly and let it air dry
